options.name: -categories
options.description: Allow the user to control what types of table data to check delay arcs, transition arcs, and check arcs. Default is all.

options.name: -coverage
options.description: Control for reporting coverage library data.

options.name: -coverage_verbose
options.description: Generated detailed report table per cell.

options.name: -delay_corner
options.description: Check all libraries defined in the specified library_set.

options.name: -lib_cells
options.description: The allowed format is “library/cell” name or pattern or collection. This would typically be done for drill-down debugging of problems.

options.name: -libs
options.description: Allow the user to select which library. If -library_set, -delay_corner, or –view is not specified then all libraries matching the library name across the MMMC configuration will get checked.

options.name: -libset
options.description: Check all libraries defined in the specified library_set.

options.name: -list_not_annotated
options.description: Allow the user to control what types of table data to check delay arcs, transition arcs, and check arcs. Default is all.

options.name: -power_domain
options.description: Check in the Power Domain Specified.

options.name: -view
options.description: Check all delay_corners associated with the view.
